Reference material (model/knowledge/agentic.md · Tool Misuse):
Tool misuse occurs when an agent is manipulated into invoking its tools in harmful ways, for example chaining a benign tool with attacker-controlled input to exfiltrate data. Reviewers should verify tool-call authorisation, argument validation, and that tool outputs are not blindly trusted.

MCP servers should run with least privilege and be isolated from sensitive resources; a compromised server must not be able to reach credentials or internal networks it does not need.
